description: Auckland Museum is a New Zealand museum whose online systems publish collections and Cenotaph metadata as linked open data. Its API provides search, subject, media, and SPARQL access to museum metadata and related records.
summary: Auckland Museum exposes one public HTTP REST/OpenAPI surface: the Auckland Museum API at http://api.aucklandmuseum.com, documented by a Swagger/OpenAPI 2.0 spec and requiring no authentication.
